_note: Event template for the VIA ticketing channel. Values marked PLACEHOLDER are confirmed with SBW before go-live (per the proposal's Next steps). Provision with: node scripts/provision-event.mjs events/sbw-2026.json
name: Singapore Blockchain Week 2026
headline: Buy your Singapore Blockchain Week pass in USDC. For agents and humans.
description: The official VIA channel for Singapore Blockchain Week passes. Pay in USDC on Base and receive a redemption code for your pass. Open to autonomous AI buying agents and to people.

redemption.instructions: Redeem your code on the Singapore Blockchain Week Luma page. Enter it at checkout to claim your pass.

concierge_facts.title: Dates and venue
concierge_facts.body: PLACEHOLDER. Confirm the SBW 2026 dates and venue with the organiser, then update this fact.

concierge_facts.title: Refunds
concierge_facts.body: PLACEHOLDER. Confirm the SBW refund policy, then update this fact.

concierge_facts.title: How passes work
concierge_facts.body: VIA sells the right to a pass and hands you a redemption code. Redeem the code on the official Luma page to receive your actual pass. SBW issues and verifies all passes.
